title: Tunisian Chicken Tacos
description: A fusion of Tunisian and Mexican flavors, these chicken tacos are a unique and delicious twist on traditional Mexican cuisine.
instructions: Season chicken breast with Tunisian spice blend.
Bake chicken breast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble tacos by slicing cooked chicken, placing on a tortilla, and topping with rest salad mix, shredded cheese, and a sprinkle of Tunisian spice blend.
To make crispy taco shells, place a square of brik pastry in a mini muffin tin, pressing into the corners to form a shell.
Bake pastry shells in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve tacos in crispy taco shells.
